patches.reason: Fathom uses 'recording_id' (integer) as the meeting primary key; the generic fallback list only checks 'id', 'ID', 'name', 'uuid', etc. Without this, sync stored 0 meetings.
patches.validated_outcome: Full sync fetches 20+ meetings across 2 pages with all rich fields (transcript, action_items, summary, crm_matches).

patches.summary: Four fixes in sync.go: (1) treat non-empty next_cursor as hasMore=true; (2) cursorParam 'after' → 'cursor'; (3) sinceParam 'since' → 'created_after'; (4) incremental sync clears cursor and uses created_after filter instead of resuming from positional cursor.
patches.reason: Fathom's cursor is positional (descending order) not temporal — resuming it on incremental sync re-fetches old meetings rather than new ones. The correct incremental approach is to start from page 1 filtered by created_after=last_synced_at.
patches.validated_outcome: Full sync fetches all 3,366 meetings; incremental sync completes in ~3 seconds fetching only 1 new record.

patches.summary: Sync command adds include_action_items, include_summary, include_transcript, include_crm_matches params for the meetings resource.
patches.reason: Fathom's /meetings endpoint omits these fields by default. Novel commands (commitments, topics, brief, crm-gaps) require them. Without this, all novel commands return empty results.
patches.validated_outcome: After sync, meetings have 5-15 action items and 300-500 transcript segments per meeting.

patches.summary: Fixed search.go: case '' branch never called db.Search(); added FTS snippet extraction with clean text output.
patches.reason: Generated search command's empty-resourceType case created a 'seen' map and returned nil results. Also added cleanSnippet() to strip JSON field noise from FTS snippet() output so context is human-readable.
patches.validated_outcome: 'fathom-pp-cli search "data pipeline clearpack"' returns ranked meetings with clean highlighted snippets.

patches.summary: Added 'db export' and 'db restore' commands for local store backup and transfer without API calls.
patches.reason: Built-in export hits the live API and returns paginated envelopes — not suitable for dumping all synced data. db export writes one JSONL record per line from local SQLite; db restore loads it back. Also supports SQLite file format via --format sqlite.
patches.validated_outcome: db export of 3,366 meetings produces 3,366-line JSONL (300MB); db restore into a fresh DB recovers all 3,366 rows.

patches.summary: Guarded m.CreatedAt[:10] slices in crm_gaps_ff.go, brief_ff.go, account_ff.go, and stale_ff.go against empty/short strings.
patches.reason: Fathom meetings with missing created_at fields caused a runtime slice-bounds panic. search.go already had the len >= 10 guard; this propagates the same fix to the four remaining sites.
patches.validated_outcome: go build ./... passes cleanly after the fix.

patches.summary: Added isSQLiteFile() guard before clear/copyFile in the sqlite restore path.
patches.reason: Without validation, passing a non-SQLite file with --format sqlite (and optionally --clear) silently destroys the live database with no recovery path. isSQLiteFile() was already defined in the file but never called.

patches.summary: Fixed AdaptiveLimiter.Wait() to serialize concurrent callers by holding the mutex through the sleep.
patches.reason: Releasing the lock before time.Sleep allowed all concurrent sync workers to read the same lastRequest, sleep the same duration, then fire simultaneously — delivering concurrency×rate req/s instead of the configured rate.

patches.summary: Added isSafeIdentifier() allowlist guard before fmt.Sprintf field interpolation in ResolveByName.
patches.reason: Field names were interpolated directly into SQL. While current callers pass hardcoded values, a future caller passing a user-derived field name would be a SQL injection vector.

patches.summary: Fixed bar chart truncation in topics_ff.go to not cut mid-codepoint on the 3-byte █ character.
patches.reason: bar[:40] sliced at byte 40, which lands inside the 14th █ codepoint (3 bytes each), producing invalid UTF-8 for any term appearing ≥14 times. Fixed by capping the repeat count at 40 runes instead of slicing bytes.

patches.summary: Fixed coverage_ff.go to enumerate all weeks in range (not just recorded ones) and render gap weeks with ✗ status.
patches.reason: Only weeks present in weekRecorded were added to allWeeks, so gap weeks were silently omitted from both JSON and human output — defeating the command's primary purpose. Now iterates all weeks in range and marks gaps with Recorded:false.

patches.summary: Fixed db_ff.go JSONL envelope to use json.Marshal(rt) instead of raw string concatenation for resource_type.
patches.reason: Raw concatenation of rt into a JSON string literal produces malformed JSON if rt contains backslashes or quotes (e.g. from a restored JSONL with unusual resource type names).

patches.summary: Added 9 novel commands not available in any Fathom MCP server: commitments, topics, brief, velocity, workload, account, stale, crm-gaps, coverage.
patches.reason: Fathom API has no aggregation endpoints. All novel commands read from the local SQLite store populated by sync.
